title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 198.027 - On-site revisit not required, when
text:
198.027.  On-site revisit not required, when. — If a facility submits satisfactory documentation that establishes correction of any deficiency contained within the written report of deficiency required by section 198.026, an on-site revisit of such deficiency may not be required.
(L. 2003 S.B. 556 & 311)
